title: Admission
content: Admission Helpdesk Online Query Important Dates FAQs for Admissions Programs on Offer Admission Results Fee Details Admission Notices Admission Admissions in 2026 for following programs: For any subsequent update/ clarification kindly give your contact details to admissions@juitsolan.in. We shall keep you updated. Beware of Touts & Unscrupulous elements. Do not fall prey to the false assurance of paid seats. Results, where finalized, have been uploaded/shall be put up as per schedule announced. B.Tech.
